patch.value: GH-489: pm next summary reports blocked: 0 while blocked items exist — blocked companion list missing

## Source
GitHub issue #489 (dogfood, version 2026.7.9).

## Reproduction
```bash
pm init uxt --defaults --author probe
pm create task "First"                       # -> uxt-A (open)
pm create task "Second" --blocked-by uxt-A   # -> uxt-B (status: blocked)
pm next
```
`pm next` emits `summary.blocked: 0` and no blocked-companion section, while the same envelope's recommended entry says `unblocks 1 item(s): uxt-B` and `pm list-blocked` correctly shows 1 blocked item. A `blocked_limit: 5` filter is even printed, so the companion surface is advertised but never populated.

## Expected
`summary.blocked` counts blocked items and the blocked companion lists them with their blockers (as `pm next --help` documents).

## Why it matters for agents
`pm next` is the primary "what should I work on" entrypoint. The envelope contradicts itself (unblocks list vs blocked: 0), so an agent trusting the summary concludes no blocked work exists and skips triage. The data is already computed for the unblocks reasons — only the summary/companion aggregation misses it.

## Scope
Fix the aggregation in the pm next summary + blocked companion; add a regression test covering the blocked-companion path in a fresh workspace. Related output-shape defects: pm-hfg5 (ready[0] duplication), pm-yl6c (cross-agent resume recommendation).

pm next summary.blocked equals the true blocked count in a fresh two-item workspace; blocked companion section lists blocked items with their blockers up to blocked_limit; regression test covers the repro from GH-489; envelope no longer contradicts the unblocks reasons

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Root-cause narrowing (review 2026-07-10, current main build): the GH-489 repro still fails — fresh workspace with one status=blocked item yields summary.blocked: 0 AND candidates: 1, i.e. the status=blocked item is excluded from the candidate pool entirely, not merely miscounted. Contrast: the real workspace reports blocked: 25 with zero status=blocked items (pm stats), so next's blocked counter is derived from open items with open blockers (graph-blocked). Fix likely needs BOTH paths: include status=blocked items in candidates/summary and populate the companion from the union of status-blocked + graph-blocked. Regression test should assert candidates counts them too.
